title: コンビニ前にはご注意を

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way home after a day out with Satono
Diamond, we spot two Umamusume hanging out
by a convenience store.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Another Flamingo Kid?! Damn it! That's my fifth
one!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: I struck out too... Just a Pebble Worm.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's Golshi and Nakayama. I'm going to ask
them what they're doing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I have a bad feeling about this, so I follow after
Satono Diamond.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hello. And what might you be doing this fine day?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Satono! We just bought a whole heap of
"Creature Shock Choc" candy!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
We've been eating one after another, but we just
can't manage to pull Ammo Knight, the shelled
warrior—it's a super rare card!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
So you're taking on a new challenge? That sounds
fun! Do you mind if I join you?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Haha. You sure are nosy for someone so prim and
proper. ...Fine. Pick whichever one you want.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm, let's see...
Which one do you think I should choose, Trainer?
choice_data_list: The one with the sleek wrapper.
The one with the crinkled wrapper.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
That's the one I had my eye on too!
Here goes!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I got a...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: It's... um... Don...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Don Pterano, the dinosaur mob boss! Whoa! I
can't believe you got one!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: It's holographic too... Not bad, Satono.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Do you mean to say I found a rare one?! In that
case, I'd like to try opening another!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Go wild! And send them down this way as you
do—I'm the one who's gonna be eating all that
chocolate!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Okay! Here I go...
Alto! Stop right there!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I wanted to buy some Creature Shock Chocs!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
But they were all sold out... I guess I have all of
you thank for that!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Geez... Why so grumpy, El?
I tell you what...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Let's throw down! If you win, I'll give you this Don
Pterano card! But if you lose, you get this Sleepy
Cicada!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I accept your challenge! That Don Pterano will be
mine!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I hope you're ready!
It's time to...

text_block_list.name: Golshi & El
text_block_list.text: DUEL!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Uh, things have taken quite the unexpected turn,
haven't they, Trainer?

Just leave them be. They'll tire themselves out
eventually...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Cafe! Are you here to do some shopping?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Yes. The cafe I usually go to is closed... so I came
here instead...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
But on second thought... I think I'll go someplace
else... See you later...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, it sounds like you have several favorite
cafes you frequent. I'd very much like to tag
along, if you don't mind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite the fierce battle unfolding in front of her,
Satono Diamond's curiosity leads her on yet
another adventure. She really is pure at heart.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Taking the more arduous path! I like the sound of
that.
Here goes!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, just as Satono Diamond goes to open
the wrapper, a strong gust of wind blows it onto
the ground before someone's feet.
Hm? What's this?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
...Sheesh. A candy wrapper? Is this a preschool
event or something?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Heh... Perfect timing.
You want in on this, Sirius?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
In on what? A wager using candy? Please, how old
do you think I—

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Oh?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
What do we have here? A pure-hearted maiden...
I might be interested if you were my opponent.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Opponent? Are you talking about a wager?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
I am indeed. If the card in this chocolate wrapper
is a "boss" creature, you win.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
But if it's a "follower" creature, you lose, and I get
to make one request that you can't refuse... Deal?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. How very intriguing. I absolutely can't
afford to lose with a condition like that. ♪

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I accept your challenge!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Here goes!

text_block_list.name: Golshi & Nakayama
text_block_list.text: WHAAAT?!

text_block_list.name: Golshi & Nakayama
text_block_list.text:
It's a secret creature! The digital dinosaur,
5t3g05auru5!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship and Nakayama Festa wildly latch on to
the card the second they see it!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Secret creature? So does that means it's not a
boss or follower?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
...Tch. Oh, well. That means our little wager is
void. I may not have beaten you, but I did get to
see something interesting.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Then what if we simply postpone our competition
for now? Hehe. ♪

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: ...Oho?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Neither of us won, so I'd love to compete against
you again sometime!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Hah! Ahahaha! You were lucky to escape that
situation unscathed, yet you want to jump right
back into the fire?!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
...So be it. I'll wait for you at the top, and I look
forward to the day you ascend to my level.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. ♪ Now I have one more destination to
strive toward.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond doesn't back down from
challenging her senior. I realize once again just
how strong-willed she really is.
